mnemonics: Test Tiers (TT): Unit tests are the foundation, Integration tests connect the blocks, End-to-End tests run the whole chain.
keyPoints: Testing in blockchain involves multiple levels: Unit, Integration, and End-to-End (E2E).
Smart contract functionality and security are primary focuses of blockchain tests.
Testing often requires a simulated blockchain environment (testnet) to avoid real transaction costs.
commonMistakes: Only testing 'happy path' scenarios and not testing for edge cases and failure modes.
Neglecting to test gas usage and optimization, which is critical for cost-effective smart contracts.
Assuming a contract is secure after passing basic functionality tests, without thorough security and vulnerability testing.
